meta.title: Integration test topic
meta.question: Will integration test pass by December 31, 2026?
meta.resolution: Resolved by December 31, 2026 — confirmed if all subtests pass.

tagConfig._docs: Tag configuration for this topic. topicType presets: conflict, science, election, tech. Override directionHints for custom tag-to-hypothesis mappings.

actorModel.description: Decision-theoretic framework: who makes the decisions that drive this outcome?

actor1.name: Key Decision Maker
actor1.role: Primary actor whose decisions drive the outcome

methodology: ACTIONS OVER RHETORIC — only verified events move posteriors
TAG EVERYTHING — separate rhetoric from action in evidence log
DON'T FRONT-RUN — set tripwires and let news confirm
SOCIALIZATION DETECTION — recognize narrative prep patterns

evidenceLog.text: DEADLINE MIGRATION: resolution_deadline stamped on ['H1', 'H2'] based on topic startDate 2026-04-21.
RESOLUTION-DATE STAMPED: meta.resolutionDate=2026-12-31 (derived from meta.resolution). When past, governance flags topic as overdue for resolution.

dependencies._docs: Cross-topic dependency declarations. Upstream topics whose posteriors this topic's assumptions depend on. Checked mechanically on save — stale assumptions surface as governance issues.

issues: Near-maximum uncertainty — model is not discriminating

blockers: COVERAGE GAP: H2 has no indicators for or against it — this hypothesis is permanently underdetermined
COVERAGE GAP: H3 has no indicators for or against it — this hypothesis is permanently underdetermined
COVERAGE GAP: H1 has no indicators for or against it — this hypothesis is permanently underdetermined

NON-UNIFORM PRIORS without justification — posteriors are {'H1': 0.3, 'H2': 0.4, 'H3': 0.3} but posteriorHistory has no initial note explaining the asymmetry. Add a posteriorHistory entry documenting why.
warnings: No anti-indicators defined — every hypothesis needs at least one indicator that would REDUCE its probability

predictionScoring._docs: Calibration infrastructure. Snapshots are auto-created by engine on each posterior update. Record outcome when topic resolves, then compute_calibration_report() for Brier analysis.
